caption:
Most owners spend money chasing new leads while paying customers sit untouched in their CRM. Pull everyone who hasn't booked in 12 months, sort them by the service they're due for, and text them directly instead of emailing. It costs nothing to send and it reaches people who already said yes once. Want the Black Arrow team to build and send this reactivation sequence for you? DM "REVIVE".
#ServiceBusiness #CustomerRetention #HomeServiceMarketing #SmallBusinessGrowth #FieldServiceManagement
rationale: Carousels are pulling the strongest saves and shares right now, especially numbered step-by-step formats; this one delivers a full no-cost retention tactic (dormant customer reactivation) that hasn't been covered in past posts.
